rwanda_01.prompt: Why do I gotta sand myself down just to be digestible?

truth.playerText: Because people are scared of you being fully real.
truth.npcReaction: Rwanda exhales. Not relief — recognition. "Yeah. That's what I thought."

lie.playerText: It's not that bad here. You're doing fine.
lie.npcReaction: She goes quiet. She's heard this before. She expected it from you too.
lie.ledgerEntry: You told Rwanda her experience wasn't that bad.

rwanda_02_closed.prompt: Right. Sure. I'm doing fine. (She turns back to the window.)

truth.playerText: I was wrong. You don't have to minimize this for me.

lie.playerText: Everyone goes through it. It gets easier.
lie.npcReaction: She doesn't answer. The neon buzzes. You've lost her.
lie.ledgerEntry: You told Rwanda her erasure was a universal experience.

rwanda_02_open.prompt: You actually mean that? Most people just want me to perform.

truth.playerText: I know. And it's exhausting to watch, let alone live.
truth.npcReaction: She laughs — short, sharp. Real. "Okay. You're alright."

lie.playerText: People just need time to get used to you.
lie.npcReaction: Her expression flattens. "And there it is." She looks away.
lie.ledgerEntry: You told Rwanda to wait for the world to catch up to her.
